checks.name: api
findings: No API endpoints found at common paths
No GraphQL endpoint found
No CORS headers — API may not be accessible from browser-based agents
Server always returns HTML regardless of Accept header — no API content negotiation

checks.name: auth
findings: No bot detection systems detected
No CAPTCHA detected on main page or login
No OAuth/OIDC discovery endpoint found
No login form found at common paths

checks.name: docs
findings: robots.txt is present and doesn't specifically block AI bots
robots.txt references a sitemap
sitemap.xml found with ~12 URLs
No OpenAPI/Swagger specification found
No JSON-LD structured data found
No llms.txt found (emerging standard for LLM-friendly docs)

checks.name: structure
findings: Heavy div usage: 179 divs with only 18 semantic elements
Good accessibility: 215/237 interactive elements have labels
Forms are well-structured: 6/6 inputs have names
No stable test selectors found (data-testid, data-cy, etc.)
Good server-side rendering — content available without JavaScript
Good heading hierarchy: 36 headings, well-structured
3 links with no text or aria-label — invisible to agents
Good link accessibility: 222/225 links are descriptive

checks.name: errors
findings: 404 returns HTML error page (not machine-readable)
No rate limit headers found
Unexpected status 501 for DELETE on main page

checks.name: cost
findings: Page is ~25,602 tokens raw — very expensive for agents (>15,000 threshold)
Signal-to-noise ratio is 7% — most of the page is noise
Inline scripts/styles are 0% of page — reasonable
Max DOM depth is 18 — moderately nested
CSS class attributes consume ~3,274 tokens (13% of page)
Page read cost: $0.032–$0.384 per load
192 internal links — agents may waste tokens exploring

checks.name: a11y
findings: Good landmark coverage: banner, contentinfo, main, navigation, region
All 20 images have alt attributes (15 descriptive, 5 decorative)
Found 1 skip link(s) — helps agents jump to main content
No ARIA live regions — dynamic content changes may be invisible to agents
No custom tabindex — relying on natural focus order (fine for simple pages)

checks.name: performance
findings: Fast response: 115ms
Compact payload: 16KB
1 redirect(s) — acceptable
Lean resources: 0 scripts, 0 styles, 0 images
Compression enabled: br
